checkpoint.summary: unit_007 complete. select_next_unit.py rewritten around compute_frontier: deterministic frontier from v2 phase/unit depends_on; --frontier and --max N CLI flags; no-flag call preserves v1 stop-hook contract; malformed units raise MalformedPhaseGraph (exit 2) instead of silent fallback. Test suite grew from 65 to 71.
